response.justification: Bogdan has a broad full-stack background spanning 15+ years and demonstrates solid distributed systems experience from high-throughput environments, but the resume contains no evidence of the core competencies this role demands: A/B experimentation frameworks, feature flagging infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, rollout risk management, or statistical analysis. The position is scoped at Principal IC6, requiring demonstrated cross-organizational architectural leadership in growth and experimentation platforms specifically — a domain that is entirely absent from this candidate's history.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic, handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency constraints
Broad polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, C/C++, DLang, Java) covering several languages listed in the JD
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq shows awareness of modern developer tooling trends
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, experiment assignment/targeting, or feature flighting systems
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience, and no mention of statistical methods or experimental analysis anywhere in the resume
Seniority and scope fall short of IC6 Principal: no demonstrated cross-team architectural ownership, no track record of enabling multiple teams through foundational platform work

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and metrics infrastructure background
